summary: Test suite focuses exclusively on MatrixGenerator class logic but ignores critical components: no CLI testing (generate_matrix.py), no config file loading tests, no GitHub Actions workflow validation. Task explicitly requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' and 'Do NOT test your script directly' — these are unit tests that bypass the required CI/CD pipeline entirely. Missing: error scenario testing (invalid JSON, missing fields, file I/O), parameterized tests, fixture definitions, and required comments explaining approach. One test (test_feature_flag_addition_to_existing_combination) appears to test behavior that contradicts the actual implementation. Basic matrix generation logic is reasonably covered but the test suite fails to validate the complete solution including CLI, file handling, and workflow integration.
